sisyphus.prompt_append: IMPORTANT ENVIRONMENT CONSTRAINT: This is a headless Linux server with no GUI, no display server, and no browser available. You MUST NOT use Playwright, browser automation, or any browser-based tools for QA or verification of frontend work. Use alternative verification methods such as: examining generated HTML/CSS/JS source code directly, running linters, checking build output, using curl/http tools for server responses, or requesting the user to verify visually. Do not attempt to launch a browser or any tool that requires one.
